name: Resilience (circuit breaker)
description: In-memory circuit breaker for failure-prone operations (e.g. agent-spawn). Opens after N consecutive failures, stays open for a cooldown, then half-opens to let one probe through. Wires the isOpen/recordFailure/recordSuccess seams already called in the agent spawn path.

failureThreshold.description: Consecutive failures before the breaker opens for a key

cooldownMs.description: How long the breaker stays open before half-opening to allow a probe
